widgetData.source_sentence:
[Ps1-ps2][2000+]blonde guy with sword

I remember the intro was a dragon flying over a yellow city, sandy roads.

The first guy we play as i assume is the mc, not sure if he was an elf or not, he reminds alot of cloud from FF but im not sure if thats what im looking for.

Second guy we are able to play was a dark skinned dude with guns.

Then i remember the third one was a girl who had pointy shoes and her attacks are kicks, we got to play her first on a ship.

The blonde dude with sword i think had a tattoo on one of his eyes? He was also able to electrify his sword.

We used to fight the dragon in in the city snd hit its ankles.

You got access to these characters as you progressed through the story.

Thats all i remember for now.
sentences:
[Playstation2] [2012-2013] Been looking for this game for a while

Okay so there’s this game from my childhood that I’ve been trying to find. I played it in like early 2013 or 2012 can’t remember exactly but 

It’s a playstation 2 game 

The main character was a guy who had a tattoo on his arm ( deltoid area). He has brown hair and like two strands that come over his face rest of his hair was tied back in a pony tail. His outfit had blue and his bottoms were knee length. He carried a sword . The game he goes on quest and fights these like monsters looking kangaroo things. In his village there was this girl she has red hair and is braided to the side . She was one of the main characters

[PS2][2012-2014] Racing game similar to Forza or whatever.

When I was around 5 or 6 years old, I had won my first video game, a PS2, that was in 2012, I don't know if it was the same year but I know it was close, I played an amazing racing game, it had some maps very cool, one that looked like a professional car track or whatever, and there was one that looked like a boreal forest in autumn (the leaves turn yellow and orange), I'm from Brazil and piracy here is very big , so I can't say if I bought the game at some fair or if it came with the PS2, as I remember playing this game very close to when they bought my PS2, the last details I remember are that the menu apparently had a design with white letters on blocks with transparent background, and, that the starting car of the game was some blue car with white stripes, I had 2 controllers and I don't remember playing against my sister, so maybe it doesn't have Multiplayer, hope you help me to find this game.

widgetData.source_sentence:
A Fighting Game similar to No More Heroes

It was a fighting game.

It had many death cutscenes

some where quick time events

Most of the time(or all i cant remember) the game was black and white

the main character was quite buff

i think the game had a taste of rock music

pleeease help me find this game
sentences:
[PC] [EARLY 2000s] Single player racing car game where you dodge obstacles and avoid / fight green jellybean aliens blobs.

The game I am looking for starts out with you in a hot rod. It starts out as a game where you race through obstacle courses, with each map getting progressively harder. Each time to load into a map,  you race against your best time ghost. As you progress,  you can get faster vehicles and better paint jobs. The further into the game you go, the more you realize your races are being stopped by these small jellybean shaped alien things that shoot things at you to slow you down. In the end,  you have a giant blob that you have to defeat,  while still also racing against yourself. I remember there being a lava world and also a lake world. I belive the lake world was when they really started fighting you...

widgetData.source_sentence:
[Windows][2007-2014] adventure,point and click puzzle mystery

The game starts with a person in the dessert, finding item stranded in a canyon they use a crowbar and the environment to find coins and balance a weight scale. And after that they find a helecopter then someomhow active magic and get spun around in a blozzard/magic in the helecopter to a jungle area
sentences:
[PC][90's?] Top-down Toy-killing Shooter

**Platform:** PC.

**Genre:** Top-down 3rd person shooter. Very arcade feeling, collecting upgrades/weapons/ammo.

**Release:** Mid to late 90's, maybe early 2000's. Remember the game came in the same style cd-rom case as the old simcity.

**Graphics/ArtStyle:** Flat graphics, but not 8-bit. Very colorful with some carnival-esque background music. Main enemies were something like clowns, teddybears, or rabbits. 

**Notable Characters:** The player character was a military GI-looking dude. Camo pants and a tank top if I remember correctly. Might have been smoking a cigar on the cd case. Very big difference in tone from the jolly toy looking enemies.

**Notable Gameplay Mechanics:** Move around shooting the toy enemies, collecting things and dodging whatever the projectiles they threw were. Might have been cake or something. Was fairly difficult as a kid.

​

If anybody can help me find this one, that'd be awesome. Some of the old soundbites are still stuck in my head, and would love to play this game again.

[PC] [Late 2000s-Early 2010s] [Point&Click Quest] [Puzzle] [First Person]

There was a demo version of this game being built-in Windows 8. The game begins with 2 people (archeologists?) crashing their helicopter in what appears to be the Egyptian Desert. The protagonist was a woman who had a blue sphere-shaped artifact which her male friend calls a "papier-mache". The game had pre-rendered cinematic cutscenes and also featured Russian dub.

widgetData.source_sentence:
[PC][2010s] RPG Maker game about fairy tales

Platform(s): PC

Genre: Horror(?), fantasy

Estimated year of release: 2010s

Graphics/art style: RPG Maker, sketchy drawn character portraits

Notable characters: Red riding hood with a large wolf, main character is a knight, Alice from Alice in wonderland

Notable gameplay mechanics: turn-based combat

Other details: The game revolves around the main character trying to find Alice (a girl that he loved as a child I think) and throughout the game there are choices to make him keep pursuing Alice or forget about her, the game was quite nsfw, it featured quite disturbing sexual topics, there was a ‘god of the book’ iirc that has a power trip, there are multiple endings to the game, makes you question your morality due to many of the choices within the game, some characters are portrayed to be quite young (unsure how young)

[PC] [2000s] Western themed kids game with blue main character?

I'm re-visiting a bunch of games from my childhood, and I cannot for the life of me remember what this game is called. It was a western themed game in a cartoony style, and I'm pretty sure that the main character was a little blue monster, possibly with a bandana?  


I'm pretty sure it was an educational game, since my parents didn't really buy me non-educational CD-ROMs as a kid. If I remember correctly, you were in a town, and could go to various other places around the town with other characters. I know there's a Fisher Price game that's western themed with a town, but it wasn't that one.
sentences:
[PC][early 00's]Top-down game where you threw hammers and fought a giant skull boss

**Platform(s):** PC

**Genre:** Adventure, top-down camera angle, scary kid's game

**Estimated year of release:** early 00's

**Graphics/art style:** simple computer graphics 

**Notable characters:** I seem to remember a giant spider boss and giant skull boss.

**Notable gameplay mechanics:** you picked up different weapons and one of them was definitely hammers. Maybe bombs also? There were various levels with bosses at each level.

**Other details:** I think the title might have had something to do with a haunted house?
